rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Ramu, are you awake ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes. mummy. Raju also has got up.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Is Lakshmi awake ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: avaluu eddiddaale. naayiinuu eddide, ellaruu eddiddaare.
rows.english: Yes, she is awake and the dog too Everyone is up and ready.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Then, who is not awake yet ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: The puppies are not awake yet.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: saaku, banroo. kaafii kuidiri naavella aaglee kuddiddiivi.
rows.english: Enough of it, come in and drink coffee. We have had it.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: We are coming, mummy.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Has the Manager come ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: No, sir ! He hasn't turned up yet.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Has he applied for leave ? Has he left any message with you ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I don't know, sir. He has not told me anything.

rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: dehaliyinda tanti baandide, aadit ripoort kolsiddiiraa ?
rows.english: There is a telegram from Delhi. Have you despatched the audit report ?

rows.roman: illa saar. ella redi maadiddiini. ivatte kalstiini.
rows.english: No, sir. I have it ready. I'll despatch it to-day.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: I will be here. Bring the report.

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: I have it here, sir. Please sign it.
still
leave
telegram
signature
to open
